metadata.title: Brandon Hernández | Full Stack Developer & IT Engineer
metadata.description: Full Stack Developer and IT Engineer with more than a year of experience in the development of scalable web interfaces and systems. Based in Puebla, Mexico. Professional portfolio of Brandon Hernández (isahecam).
metadata.og-image-alt: Decorative ASCII art terminal-style pattern as profile background

flip-sentences: There's always something new to learn 💡

home.about-me: Full Stack Developer and Systems and Industrial Information Technology Engineer with over a year of experience building web solutions. Specialized in creating scalable web interfaces and systems for different commercial sectors.
